features: Cleans Dishes and Kitchen Surfaces: The Pink Stuff Wash-Up Spray is not only Ideal for sparkling clean dishes, but also works as a kitchen surface cleaner spray. It's a versatile addition to kitchen cleaning toolkit
Fast Acting Foaming Formula: Produces a rich, effective foam that lifts away food residues, grease and grime, leaving dishes, pots and pans sparkling clean.
Effortless Cleaning Routine: Just spray, let the foam work its magic, wipe if needed, and rinse for brilliant results with minimal effort.
Cuts Through Tough Grease: Designed to tackle stubborn, baked-on messes quickly, saving time in the kitchen.
description: Product Description Transform your dishwashing routine with The Pink Stuff Miracle Wash-Up Spray, the fast-acting foaming cleaner designed to make washing up quicker, easier and far more effective. Harnessing the iconic cleaning power of The Pink Stuff, this innovative spray cuts through grease, baked-on food, and stubborn residues with minimal effort leaving dishes, pots, pans and kitchen surfaces brilliantly clean every time. Its rich foaming action gets to work instantly, lifting away grime and loosening tough messes for effortless rinsing. Perfect for daily dishwashing or tackling tougher kitchen clean ups, this convenient spray helps keep your kitchen shining with less scrubbing required. Whether you're freshening up plates after dinner or restoring pots after cooking, The Miracle Wash-Up Spray delivers sparkling results with ease. Simply spray, wipe, and rinse for a clean you can see and feel. Ingredients Contains among other ingredients: 5-15%: Anionic surfactants, Less than 5%: Non-ionic Surfactants and Perfume. Contains preservative: Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Laurylamine Dipropylenediamine. For an ingredients data sheet visit www.dpi.uk.net. Directions For lightly soiled dishes/surfaces, just spray and rinse with water. For heavily soiled dishes/ surfaces, just spray, allow the pink foam to sit for a few minutes then wipe away and rinse with water. If placing in dishwasher ensure dishes are fully rinsed. Rinse trigger head under running warm water regularly to prevent clogging. Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured by: Star Brands Ltd, Leeds, LS15 8ZB. Star Brands EU, c/o Allegro, Innovation Factory, Belfast, BT12 7DG. See more
